document.source_title: WHO warns nicotine pouch brands targeting youth as sales surge

claims.claim_text: Nicotine pouches are being aggressively marketed to adolescents and young people.
claims.evidence_text: WHO today issues a strong warning over the rapid global expansion of nicotine pouch products, which are being aggressively marketed to adolescents and young people.

claims.claim_text: Regulation of nicotine pouches is limited or absent in many countries.
claims.evidence_text: WHO notes that regulation in many countries is limited or absent, raising concerns about youth nicotine addiction and related health risks.

claims.claim_text: Retail sales of nicotine pouches reached over 23 billion units in 2024.
claims.evidence_text: Retail sales of nicotine pouches reached over 23 billion units in 2024, increasing by more than 50% from previous year.

claims.claim_text: The global market of nicotine pouch products was worth nearly US$ 7 billion in 2025.
claims.evidence_text: The global market of nicotine pouch products was worth nearly US$ 7 billion in 2025.

claims.claim_text: Around 160 countries have no specific regulation on nicotine pouches.
claims.evidence_text: around 160 countries have no specific regulation;

entities.name: World Health Organization
entities.description: The UN agency for health that connects nations, partners and people on the front lines.
entities.evidence_text: The World Health Organization (WHO) today issues a strong warning over the rapid global expansion of nicotine pouch products.

entities.name: World No Tobacco Day
entities.description: An annual event focusing on tobacco and nicotine addiction.
entities.evidence_text: The report comes in the lead-up to World No Tobacco Day (31 May), which this year will focus on tobacco and nicotine addiction.

metrics.name: Retail sales of nicotine pouches
metrics.evidence_text: Retail sales of nicotine pouches reached over 23 billion units in 2024.

metrics.name: Global market value of nicotine pouches
metrics.evidence_text: The global market of nicotine pouch products was worth nearly US$ 7 billion in 2025.
